title: About Us
note: Company overview and examples of iconic brands including Oreo, Ritz, belVita, LU, Cadbury Dairy Milk, Milka, Toblerone, and Clif.

title: Our Brands
note: Official brand portfolio page listing major biscuits, chocolate, gum, candy, baked snacks, meals, and beverage brands.

title: Oreo
note: Official Oreo brand page describing its 1912 launch, global availability, and role as a leading cookie brand.

title: Cadbury
note: Official Cadbury brand page describing the product family including Cadbury Dairy Milk, Cadbury Egg, Flake, Wispa, Twirl, Eclairs, and chocolate drinks.

title: Annual Reports
note: Official annual-report archive used to confirm the company's reporting source and latest annual filing context.

title: Mondelēz International Reports Q4 and FY 2025 Results
note: Latest FY 2025 financial results with net revenues, operating income, and net earnings attributable to Mondelez International.

title: Mondelez International Market Cap
note: Market-cap source reporting Mondelez International's market capitalization as of May 27, 2026.

title: Open Food Facts GitHub Page
note: Open-source and open-data food product database documentation for ingredients, allergens, nutrition facts, labels, APIs, and project repositories.

title: Introduction to Open Food Facts API Documentation
note: API documentation showing how developers can access and contribute food-product data.

title: Bakery Oven
note: Open Source Ecology bakery-oven project page used as an enabling reference for distributed small-scale bakery equipment concepts.

title: Cookbook: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
note: Open recipe reference used as evidence that snack know-how can be shared through open recipe commons, while not claiming commercial readiness.

title: The Open Food Repo
note: Project homepage for an open food repository of barcoded products and API-accessible food data.

title: FoodRepo: An Open Food Repository of Barcoded Food Products
note: Research paper describing an open repository and API for barcoded food products, useful as a transparency infrastructure reference.
